title: Hidden in Frosted Flames
author: Jaymie Voogl
description: Hidden in Frosted Flames is a captivating fantasy novel that follows the journey of a young protagonist as they navigate a world filled with magic, mystery, and danger. The cover features a striking illustration of a frosted flame, symbolizing the hidden secrets and untapped power within the story. The bold typography and vibrant colors create an eye-catching design that draws readers in, while the theme of self-discovery and resilience resonates throughout the narrative, making it an engaging read for fans of fantasy and adventure.

title: Tumbleweed The Fairy Without Wings
author: Mary Natale
description: A heartwarming tale of a fairy who learns to embrace her uniqueness and find her place in the world without wings.

title: From These Broken Pieces
author: Katie Hauck Ministries
description: Broken Pieces is a collection of stories about healing from trauma through the power of Jesus. The central image of a reassembled stained glass heart conveys this theme. Aimed at those who have been incarcerated or are in rehab, we used a grittier font and bold colors to attract the audience, avoiding the typical Christian self-help look. The bold colors and illustrated elements set the book apart from others in the genre, while still accurately reflecting its message.

title: Knot by Knot
author: Davis Moore
description: The book explores how the good news of Jesus helps readers untangle the knots of sin and addiction. The hand, inspired by ancient Christian iconography, symbolizes God's hand, while the background texture comes from historic art archives. The colors and illustration are on-trend with Christian self-help books, but the ancient elements add uniqueness. I love incorporating Christian symbolism and artwork to connect modern readers to the rich history of the church and the timeless Gospel message.

title: A Good Day For A Hike
author: Jen Congdon
description: A Good Day for a Hike is a charming children's book that encourages kids to explore the outdoors and appreciate nature. The cover features a whimsical illustration of a child hiking through a vibrant forest, with playful typography that captures the adventurous spirit of the story. The bright colors and inviting design make it an appealing choice for young readers, while the theme of outdoor exploration promotes a love for nature and physical activity.

title: My Mom's Got No Qualms
author: Blake Carey
description: My Mom's Got No Qualms is a humorous and heartwarming children's book that celebrates the unique qualities of moms. The cover features a playful illustration of a mom with a quirky expression, surrounded by colorful elements that reflect the fun and loving nature of the story. The bold typography and vibrant design make it an eye-catching choice for young readers, while the theme of embracing individuality promotes self-confidence and appreciation for family.

title: It Ate One Hundred
author: Bill Sugrue
description: It Ate One Hundred is a captivating children's book that tells the story of a mysterious creature with an insatiable appetite. The cover features a bold and colorful illustration of the creature surrounded by various objects it has consumed, with playful typography that captures the whimsical nature of the story. The vibrant design and intriguing concept make it an appealing choice for young readers, while the theme of curiosity and imagination encourages kids to explore their creativity.

title: A Slayer's Reckoning
author: Ariel Cross
description: A Slayer's Reckoning is a thrilling fantasy novel that follows a young warrior on a quest for vengeance against dark forces. The cover features a striking illustration of the protagonist wielding a sword, set against a backdrop of ominous shadows and fiery hues. The bold typography and dynamic design capture the intense and action-packed nature of the story, making it an enticing choice for fans of fantasy and adventure. The theme of redemption and courage resonates throughout the narrative, inspiring readers to face their own challenges with bravery.

title: The Big Shot Trader
author: Mitesh Desai
description: The Big Shot Trader is an engaging and informative book that delves into the world of stock trading and investment strategies. The cover features a sleek and modern design with bold typography, showcasing a confident trader surrounded by financial charts and symbols. The use of vibrant colors and dynamic imagery captures the excitement and potential of the trading world, making it an appealing choice for aspiring investors. The book provides valuable insights and practical advice for navigating the complexities of the stock market, empowering readers to make informed decisions and achieve their financial goals.

title: Mr. Bangles Causes a Ruckus
author: Allyson Jannotta
description: Mr. Bangles Causes a Ruckus is a delightful children's book that follows the mischievous adventures of Mr. Bangles, a lovable cat with a knack for getting into trouble. The cover features a vibrant and playful illustration of Mr. Bangles surrounded by colorful chaos, with bold typography that captures the fun and energetic spirit of the story. The engaging design and humorous concept make it an appealing choice for young readers, while the theme of friendship and problem-solving encourages kids to embrace their creativity and find joy in life's little messes.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen, Charles E. Leiserson, Ronald L. Rivest, and Clifford Stein
description: A comprehensive textbook that provides an in-depth introduction to the design and analysis of algorithms. The book covers a wide range of topics, including sorting, searching, graph algorithms, and dynamic programming, making it an essential resource for students and professionals in computer science. With its clear explanations and rigorous approach, Introduction to Algorithms is widely regarded as a foundational text in the field of algorithm design and analysis.

title: Where The Blackbirds Rise
author: Elle Gonzales
description: A poignant coming-of-age story about a young girl's journey through loss and healing. Set against the backdrop of a small town, the novel explores themes of family, friendship, and resilience as the protagonist finds hope amidst darkness. The evocative prose and richly drawn characters make it a compelling read for fans of literary fiction.

title: Rieden Reece and the Final Flow
author: Matt Guzman
description: A thrilling mystery novel that follows detective Rieden Reece as he investigates a series of bizarre crimes linked to an ancient artifact. As Reece delves deeper into the case, he uncovers a web of secrets and conspiracies that threaten to unravel the fabric of reality itself. With its fast-paced narrative and intricate plot twists, this book is a must-read for fans of suspense and intrigue.

title: Eamon in the Library
author: Guy Petelli
description: A heartwarming tale of a young boy's adventures in a magical library. When Eamon discovers a hidden door in the library, he is transported to a fantastical world filled with talking books and enchanted creatures. As he navigates this new realm, Eamon learns valuable lessons about friendship, courage, and the power of imagination. The whimsical storytelling and charming illustrations make it a delightful read for children and adults alike.

title: The Big Prince
author: Yordanka Minkova
description: A captivating historical fiction novel that tells the story of a young prince's rise to power amidst political intrigue and betrayal. Set in a richly detailed medieval kingdom, the book explores themes of loyalty, ambition, and the complexities of leadership. With its compelling characters and immersive world-building, The Big Prince offers a thrilling and thought-provoking reading experience for fans of historical fiction.

title: The Big Yank (Splash!)
author: Sandy Hoag
description: A gripping thriller that follows a group of strangers who become trapped in an underwater research facility after a catastrophic event. As they struggle to survive and find a way to escape, they uncover dark secrets about the facility and its true purpose. The intense atmosphere and suspenseful plot make it a page-turner for fans of science fiction and mystery.

title: Annabel Pickering and the Sky Pirates: The Fantastical Contraption
author: Bretigne Shaffer
description: A thrilling steampunk adventure that follows Annabel Pickering, a daring sky pirate, as she embarks on a quest to find a legendary contraption that holds the key to unimaginable power. Along the way, Annabel faces treacherous skies, cunning adversaries, and unexpected alliances. With its richly imagined world and fast-paced narrative, this book is a must-read for fans of fantasy and adventure.

title: Southland Academy for Supernatural Youth
author: Sandra Tentler & Wren Tentler
description: A captivating fantasy novel that follows a group of teenagers with supernatural abilities as they navigate the challenges of attending a prestigious academy. As they uncover hidden secrets about their powers and the academy's true purpose, they must band together to confront dark forces threatening their world. With its engaging characters and thrilling plot, this book is a must-read for fans of young adult fantasy.

title: Take Your Lead
author: Richard S. Dillard and Brian G. Dillard
description: An insightful guide to leadership and personal development, offering practical advice and strategies for taking charge of your life and career. The book explores various leadership styles and provides actionable steps for cultivating confidence, resilience, and effective communication. With its engaging writing style and real-world examples, Take Your Lead is an invaluable resource for anyone looking to enhance their leadership skills and achieve their goals.

title: Beyond the Border
author: Nicole Rogers
description: A compelling memoir that chronicles the author's journey of self-discovery and resilience as she navigates the challenges of life. From overcoming adversity to finding her voice, Beyond the Border is an inspiring story of courage and determination. The book delves into themes of identity, family, and the pursuit of dreams, offering readers a heartfelt and relatable narrative that encourages them to embrace their own journeys with strength and hope.
